data.title: 国际服活动复刻「Alabaster Calling Card ~Mansion Masquerade and the Essence of Beauty~」

data.body:
[Event Preview]

Sensei, 'Alabaster Calling Card ~Mansion Masquerade and the Essence of Beauty~' event is coming back soon!

If you missed it before, this is your chance to see it!
